ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "aun" REAL /* Assessment Unit Number for the school */,
  "school_num" INTEGER /* School number */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID of the school */,
  "facil_name" TEXT /* Name of the school facility */,
  "facilname_label" TEXT /* Label for the school facility */,
  "facil_address" TEXT /* Address of the school facility */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the school facility */,
  "facil_telephone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school facility */,
  "active" TEXT /* Status of the school (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the school's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grade_levels ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the geospatial data */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the school location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the school location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the school is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "type_specific" TEXT /* Specific type of school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_levels" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the school (e.g., Elementary, Middle) */,
  "grade_org" TEXT /* Organization of the grade level (e.g., K-5, 6-8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school associated with the enrollment data */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Enrollment number of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the enrollment data is recorded */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., total, by grade level) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Teacher, Staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the school data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the school data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., classroom, gym, library) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the facility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Teacher, Staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
